items.description: Multi vehicle crash on I-376 eastbound between 0 miles west of Exit 74: BEECHWOOD BL TO I-376 EAST/WEST and .8 miles west of Exit 77: EDGEWOOD/SWISSVALE. There is a lane restriction.
